idea-plugin.name: Free Rainbow Braces
idea-plugin.description: Simplest delimiter coloring free! Rainbow coloring for (), [], {} based on nesting level. Works in multiple IDEs (RustRover, Rider, IntelliJ-based). Features - Rainbow coloring for ()[]{} by nesting level - Works in Rust, C#, Java, Kotlin, C/C++, JS/TS and more - Skips strings and comments when possible (lexer-based) - Lightweight: highlights only visible area Open Source
